title: Toprose - Fungus Control and Protect ready to use - Protects Roses from Disease for Stronger, Healthier Blooms - Plant Protection, Rose Care, Ready to Use, Black Spot Control - 1L
features: DISEASE CONTROL: Controls all major rose diseases, such as blackspot, powdery mildew, white rust, and leaf spot
EFFECTIVE FORMULA: Fast acting contact and systemic formula ensures it gets working quickly, whilst protecting for up to 3 weeks
SUITABLE FOR: Suitable for use on all rose types in and around the garden, conservatory, greenhouse, and home
EASY TO USE: Convenient, ready to use spray with twist and lock function for quick application
HOW TO USE: Use at the first sign of infection for best results
description: From the manufacturer TOTAL ROSE CARE Toprose Fungus Control & Protect is the fast-acting solution for controlling and protecting your roses against major leaf diseases. Teamed with Toprose Rose & Shrub Food, it provides full care solution for rose growers! 2-in-1 PROTECTION Suitable for use on all rose types in and around the garden, conservatory, greenhouse, and home - it not only protects, but eradicates common rose diseases through contact and systemic action. EFFECTIVE CONTROL Best used at the first sign of infection, it can protect your plant from diseases for up to 3 weeks, ensuring your roses stay at their best.
